title: Bihar Elections 2025: Key issues dominate debates in Sandesh
snippet_text: As the election campaign intensifies, voters in Sandesh assembly constituency raise questions about infrastructure development, road connectivity, and agricultural support schemes.

title: Political rally in Sandesh draws massive crowds ahead of voting day
snippet_text: Top party leaders addressed a massive rally in Sandesh promising job creations, free electricity, and specialized sub-plans for rural developmental bounds.

title: Flood protection works in Sandesh inspected by state cabinet delegation
snippet_text: With local embankments requiring urgent reinforcements, the local flood relief work has become a major talking point in Sandesh.

title: Welfare scheme execution becomes election issue in Sandesh
snippet_text: Local reports indicate that MGNREGA work allocations and PMAY home delivery rates are taking center stage in public debates across Sandesh assembly segment.
